title: Morning Blood Pressure + Medication Routine
details: Check blood pressure before the morning dose, take the prescribed medication, and log both readings for clinician review.
prep_required: ["Medication organizer refilled","Blood pressure cuff placed near medication"]
skip_adjustment: If missed, record the reason and resume the next scheduled dose without doubling medication.

title: Primary Care Review - Check-In
details: Review symptoms, medication adherence, and recent health trends with the physician.
skip_adjustment: Rebook the next available provider slot and send the latest metrics summary ahead of time.

title: Lab Testing Appointment - Check-In
details: Complete planned bloodwork or diagnostic testing and confirm follow-up routing.
skip_adjustment: Book the next morning lab slot and preserve fasting instructions.

title: Physiotherapy Review - Plan Tuning
details: Assess mobility constraints and exercise tolerance, then adjust the movement plan.
skip_adjustment: Rebook the next available provider slot and send the latest metrics summary ahead of time.

title: Weekly Injection Window - Maintenance Cycle
details: Administer the weekly medication during a stable routine window and record the site used.
skip_adjustment: Flag for clinician review if skipped; do not double dose without instructions.

title: Post-Meal Walk - Glucose Control
details: Take a brisk walk after a main meal to support glucose control, blood pressure management, and daily activity consistency.
skip_adjustment: Move the session to the next available daylight slot within 24 hours and record the reason if skipped.

title: Dietitian Consultation - Plan Tuning
details: Review meal adherence, travel eating patterns, and nutrition barriers.
prep_required: ["Photos of recent meals available","Food diary updated"]
skip_adjustment: Rebook the next available provider slot and send the latest metrics summary ahead of time.

title: Mobility Flow - Recovery Focus
details: Move through controlled range-of-motion work and keep breathing relaxed.
skip_adjustment: Move to the next free slot within 48 hours and lower intensity by one step.

title: Sleep Coaching Call - Quarterly Review
details: Review bedtime consistency, evening routine, and overnight recovery patterns.
skip_adjustment: Rebook the next available provider slot and send the latest metrics summary ahead of time.

title: Low-Glycemic Lunch - Protein Rebuild
details: Use lean protein, vegetables, and stable carbohydrates for lunch composition.
skip_adjustment: Replace with the closest balanced meal option and record deviation in the nutrition log.
